known_gaps: The protected Class AB headphone path now passes schematic electrical validation and PCB realization with verified LMV321 op-amp, diode, and output-transistor component selections.
The board envelope is intentionally larger for this fixture so realized amplifier block placements remain inside the outline without weakening placement validation for undersized boards.
Current warnings are endpoint-realization issues: several inter-block routing endpoints do not yet resolve to generated PCB pads, so skip_routing remains enabled while endpoint binding is closed out.
The current hard blocker has moved to board validation evidence after project write, where generated board connectivity still needs promotion-quality proof.

Output protection remains connectivity-level: fault_protection_status is placeholder_blocked, active fault protection is not implemented, HP_RET-to-LOAD_REF load-return policy is not promoted, and separated LOAD_REF-to-GND net-tie evidence is not proven.

Amplifier output transistor evidence remains warning-only for fabrication promotion: power dissipation, thermal review, safe operating area, and bias-diode thermal placement evidence are still review_required.
Real KiCad ERC/DRC evidence remains skipped until endpoint binding, routing, and validation blockers are resolved.
notes: Optional protected Class AB headphone amplifier fixture that captures the first KiCad-backed evidence gap after schematic alias cleanup and placement fit: endpoint realization plus board validation before KiCad checks. Configuring KICADAI_KICAD_CLI should not promote this fixture until it reaches kicad_checks. DRC is intentionally not required while the fixture stops before routed PCB validation.
